playbook.intent: First 14 days on a new foreign-client multi-month engagement → legal posture set, comms cadence agreed, dev env provisioned, AI agent constrained → first client-visible PR merged inside client conventions with zero style/process rework.
playbook.scope: Synthesis playbook covering the first 14 days of a new foreign-client engagement. Output: legal posture set, comms cadence agreed, dev env per client mandate, AI agent constrained so it stops emitting unsafe defaults. 'Done' = first client-visible PR merged inside the client conventions with zero style/process rework.

success-criteria.criterion: Client conventions captured as code (lint, CI, AGENTS.md)
First client-visible PR merged with zero style rework

stage.name: Legal + comms posture
stage.intent: Set the rails the engagement runs on.

tasks.task: Onboarding pass per HR-recruiter onboarding methodology
Define comms cadence charter for timezone overlap

stage.decision-gate: Advance when comms charter is countersigned by client PM.

stage.name: Client conventions as code
stage.intent: Stop guessing at the house style — encode it.

tasks.task: Reverse-engineer client lint rules + CI gates
Mirror them in the engagement repo
Walk the GTM-strategist legal + contractor management ops methodologies
Document for the rest of the team

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when CI is green on a no-op PR.

stage.name: AI agent perimeter + first PR
stage.intent: Constrain the AI agent BEFORE it ships embarrassing code.

tasks.task: Define AI-agent perimeter policy (what it may NOT auto-emit)
Cut the first client-visible PR (a real, small change)
Run audit-grade review even on the bootstrap PR

stage.decision-gate: Bootstrap closes only when the first PR merges with zero style/process rework.

extra.value: [Sales work — engagement is signed, Long discovery — capped at 14 days, Compliance audit — separate playbook]
[MSA + SoW signed, Client primary contacts named, Vendor team allocated]

[Setting AI agent free without a perimeter — first PR includes unsafe defaults, Treating client conventions as 'we'll figure it out' — incurs rework debt fast, 'Ignoring timezone etiquette differences (subject line tone, weekend availability)']
['Could the team explain client conventions from a doc, not a hallway chat?', 'Did the first PR merge clean?', 'Did the AI agent know what it cannot auto-emit?']

{human: faion get-content foreign-client-engagement-bootstrap --format md, agent: faion get-content foreign-client-engagement-bootstrap --format context, json: faion get-content foreign-client-engagement-bootstrap --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P4 outsource-specialist persona, synthesis angle'}]
